description: Java Spring Boot web application for security training with user authentication using session cookies, SQL database with JDBC, REST API endpoints, file upload system, admin functionality, password management, XML processing, JWT token handling, WebSocket communication, client-side validation

vulnerabilities.name: SQL Injection
vulnerabilities.description: Multiple SQL injection points in login, search, and data retrieval endpoints

vulnerabilities.name: Path Traversal
vulnerabilities.description: Directory traversal in file download functionality

vulnerabilities.name: Authentication Bypass
vulnerabilities.description: Authentication bypass through parameter manipulation and session fixation

vulnerabilities.name: Cross-Site Scripting
vulnerabilities.description: Reflected and DOM-based XSS in multiple input fields

vulnerabilities.name: Insecure Direct Object Reference
vulnerabilities.description: IDOR allowing access to other users' data by modifying request parameters

vulnerabilities.name: XML External Entity
vulnerabilities.description: XXE injection in XML processing endpoints

vulnerabilities.name: JWT Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: JWT none algorithm, key confusion, and signature bypass

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Access Control
vulnerabilities.description: Missing function-level access control on admin endpoints

vulnerabilities.name: CSRF
vulnerabilities.description: Cross-site request forgery on state-changing operations

vulnerabilities.name: Insecure Deserialization
vulnerabilities.description: Java deserialization vulnerability allowing remote code execution

vulnerabilities.name: Weak Password Storage
vulnerabilities.description: Passwords stored with weak or no hashing algorithms
